title: CloudScale Password Policy
content: All employee passwords must be a minimum of 14 characters. Passwords must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, one number, and one special character (!, @, #, etc.). Passwords must be rotated every 90 days. Users cannot reuse any of their last 5 passwords.

title: Resetting Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
content: If an employee loses access to their 2FA device, they must contact the IT Helpdesk via Slack at #it-support or email support@cloudscale.io. The IT team will require visual verification via a brief video call before generating a one-time bypass code. Bypass codes expire exactly 15 minutes after issuance.

title: Remote Work Equipment Allowance
content: Full-time employees are eligible for a one-time remote work stipend of $500 to purchase home office equipment, including monitors, keyboards, mice, and ergonomic chairs. Receipts must be submitted through the Expensify portal under the tag 'Remote-2026' within 30 days of purchase.

title: Annual Leave and PTO Accrual
content: Standard salaried employees accrue 1.25 days of Paid Time Off (PTO) per full month of employment, totaling 15 days per calendar year. A maximum of 5 unused PTO days can roll over into the next calendar year. Any additional unused days above this cap are forfeited on December 31st.
